requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency Direction — PNEE / ANRE Program

summary.en: Morocco's national energy efficiency program PNEE (Programme National pour l'Efficacité Energétique) and ANRE (Autorité Nationale de Régulation de l'Electricité) direct the industrial motor market toward higher IE classes aligned with IEC 60034-30-1. ONEE (Office National de l'Electricité et de l'Eau Potable) oversees the national grid. Morocco has not enacted a mandatory statutory MEPS regulation for industrial motors equivalent to EU Ecodesign Regulation 2019/1781 as of the verified date; however, government programs promote IE2 and above for energy-intensive applications and public procurement may require higher efficiency classes. Exporters should verify whether ANRE has issued binding efficiency regulations for specific motor categories.
summary.zh: 摩洛哥国家能效计划PNEE及ANRE（国家电力监管局）引导工业电动机市场向IEC 60034-30-1所定义的更高IE等级发展。ONEE（国家电力与水务局）负责监管国家电网。截至核实日期，摩洛哥尚未颁布等同欧盟生态设计法规2019/1781的工业电动机强制法定MEPS法规；但政府计划推广节能型应用中使用IE2及以上电动机，公共采购可能要求更高效率等级。出口商应核实ANRE是否已针对特定电机类别颁布具有约束力的效率法规。
summary.zht: 摩洛哥國家能效計劃PNEE及ANRE（國家電力監管局）引導工業電動機市場向IEC 60034-30-1所定義的更高IE等級發展。ONEE（國家電力與水務局）負責監管國家電網。截至核實日期，摩洛哥尚未頒布等同歐盟生態設計法規2019/1781的工業電動機強制法定MEPS法規；但政府計劃推廣節能型應用中使用IE2及以上電動機，公共採購可能要求更高效率等級。出口商應核實ANRE是否已針對特定電機類別頒布具有約束力的效率法規。

standards_or_laws: NM IEC 60034-30-1 (IMANOR adoption — IE efficiency classes)
PNEE — Programme National pour l'Efficacite Energetique (Morocco national energy efficiency program)
ANRE — Autorite Nationale de Regulation de l'Electricite (energy regulator)

summary.en: China's GB 18613-2020 mandates IE3 as the legal minimum efficiency for most three-phase induction motors since 2021-06-01. Grade 2 (= IE4) is the voluntary energy-saving evaluation level. This mandatory IE3 floor broadly aligns with the direction Morocco promotes through PNEE, though Morocco has not yet enacted an equivalent mandatory MEPS statute.
summary.zh: 中国GB 18613-2020自2021年6月1日起将IE3规定为大多数三相感应电动机的法定最低能效。2级（= IE4）为自愿节能评价值。该强制性IE3底线与摩洛哥通过PNEE推广的方向大体一致，尽管摩洛哥尚未颁布等效的强制性MEPS法规。
summary.zht: 中國GB 18613-2020自2021年6月1日起將IE3規定為大多數三相感應電動機的法定最低能效。2級（= IE4）為自願節能評價值。該強制性IE3底線與摩洛哥通過PNEE推廣的方向大體一致，儘管摩洛哥尚未頒布等效的強制性MEPS法規。

gap.en: Morocco promotes IE2 and above through PNEE but has not yet legislated a mandatory MEPS equivalent to EU Ecodesign for industrial motors as of the verified date. Chinese IE3 motors meet or exceed the PNEE promotion direction. However, conformity route matters: CCC is not recognised; IMANOR or CE DoC is required. Exporters should confirm whether any binding ANRE efficiency regulation has been issued after the verified date.
gap.zh: 摩洛哥通过PNEE推广IE2及以上效率，但截至核实日期尚未为工业电动机立法颁布等同欧盟生态设计的强制MEPS。中国IE3电动机满足或超过PNEE推广方向。但合规路径至关重要：CCC不被认可；须提供IMANOR合规证明或CE符合性声明。出口商应确认核实日期后ANRE是否已颁布具有约束力的效率法规。
gap.zht: 摩洛哥通過PNEE推廣IE2及以上效率，但截至核實日期尚未為工業電動機立法頒布等同歐盟生態設計的強制MEPS。中國IE3電動機滿足或超過PNEE推廣方向。但合規路徑至關重要：CCC不被認可；須提供IMANOR合規證明或CE符合性聲明。出口商應確認核實日期後ANRE是否已頒布具有約束力的效率法規。

mandatory_status.target: No mandatory statutory MEPS confirmed for imported industrial motors as of verified date — verify current ANRE/IMANOR requirements; PNEE promotes IE2+ for energy-intensive applications
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 18613-2020 enforced by SAMR since 2021-06-01

source.publisher: ANRE — Autorite Nationale de Regulation de l'Electricite (Morocco)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese IE3 motors satisfy the efficiency direction Morocco promotes through PNEE. However, the conformity route — IMANOR NM mark or CE DoC — must be confirmed. CCC certification is not a recognised route. Exporters must also verify whether ANRE has issued updated binding efficiency regulations after 2026-06-17. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国IE3电动机符合摩洛哥通过PNEE推广的能效方向。但合规路径——IMANOR NM标志或CE符合性声明——须予以确认。CCC认证不是被认可的路径。出口商还须核实ANRE是否已在2026年6月17日后颁布最新的具有约束力的效率法规。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國IE3電動機符合摩洛哥通過PNEE推廣的能效方向。但合規路徑——IMANOR NM標誌或CE符合性聲明——須予以確認。CCC認證不是被認可的路徑。出口商還須核實ANRE是否已在2026年6月17日後頒布最新的具有約束力的效率法規。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。

requirement_topic.en: Grid Voltage Compatibility — 400/230 V, 50 Hz (vs China 380/220 V)
requirement_topic.zh: 电网电压兼容性——400/230 V，50 Hz（对比中国380/220 V）
requirement_topic.zht: 電網電壓相容性——400/230 V，50 Hz（對比中國380/220 V）

summary.en: Morocco's national grid operates at 400/230 V (three-phase / single-phase), 50 Hz, managed by ONEE. This is the same frequency as China (50 Hz) but differs in three-phase voltage: Morocco 400 V vs China 380 V. Industrial motors sold in Morocco must be rated for or compatible with 400 V, 50 Hz operation. Motors wound and rated for 380 V (Chinese standard) may not deliver full rated performance at 400 V without derating or rewinding — the 5.3% voltage difference can affect insulation stress, current draw, and efficiency in service.
summary.zh: 摩洛哥国家电网由ONEE管理，运行电压为400/230 V（三相/单相），频率50 Hz。这与中国的频率相同（50 Hz），但三相电压不同：摩洛哥为400 V，中国为380 V。在摩洛哥销售的工业电动机必须额定或兼容400 V、50 Hz运行。按380 V（中国标准）绕制和额定的电动机，若未经降额或重绕，在400 V下可能无法提供完整额定性能——5.3%的电压差异可能影响绝缘应力、电流及运行效率。
summary.zht: 摩洛哥國家電網由ONEE管理，運行電壓為400/230 V（三相/單相），頻率50 Hz。這與中國的頻率相同（50 Hz），但三相電壓不同：摩洛哥為400 V，中國為380 V。在摩洛哥銷售的工業電動機必須額定或相容400 V、50 Hz運行。按380 V（中國標準）繞製和額定的電動機，若未經降額或重繞，在400 V下可能無法提供完整額定性能——5.3%的電壓差異可能影響絕緣應力、電流及運行效率。

standards_or_laws: NM IEC 60034-1 (IMANOR adoption — ratings including voltage and frequency)

summary.en: China's standard three-phase grid voltage is 380 V (line-to-line), 50 Hz. GB 755-2019 (equivalent to IEC 60034-1) governs motor ratings including voltage class. Motors manufactured for the Chinese domestic market are typically wound and rated for 380 V, 50 Hz; they may bear dual-voltage ratings (e.g. 380/660 V) but are not automatically rated for 400 V Morocco grid operation.
summary.zh: 中国标准三相电网电压为380 V（线间），频率50 Hz。GB 755-2019（等同IEC 60034-1）规定包括电压等级在内的电机额定参数。为中国国内市场制造的电机通常按380 V、50 Hz绕制和额定；可能标注双电压额定值（如380/660 V），但不自动适用于摩洛哥400 V电网运行。
summary.zht: 中國標準三相電網電壓為380 V（線間），頻率50 Hz。GB 755-2019（等同IEC 60034-1）規定包括電壓等級在內的電機額定參數。為中國國內市場製造的電機通常按380 V、50 Hz繞製和額定；可能標注雙電壓額定值（如380/660 V），但不自動適用於摩洛哥400 V電網運行。

standards_or_laws: GB 755-2019 (equivalent to IEC 60034-1 — motor ratings and performance)

gap.en: The 380 V (China) vs 400 V (Morocco) three-phase grid voltage difference is the most immediate technical gap for Chinese motor exports to Morocco. A motor rated 380 V only cannot be simply installed on a 400 V grid without engineering review. Common solutions: order motors with dual/multi-voltage winding capable of 400 V, or confirm the nameplate voltage range covers 400 V operation. Frequency is identical (50 Hz), reducing the adaptation burden compared to markets with different Hz.
gap.zh: 380 V（中国）与400 V（摩洛哥）三相电网电压差异是中国电动机出口摩洛哥最直接的技术差距。仅额定380 V的电动机不能在未经工程评估的情况下直接安装在400 V电网上。常见解决方案：订购具备400 V运行能力的双/多电压绕组电动机，或确认铭牌电压范围涵盖400 V运行。频率相同（50 Hz），相比频率不同的市场降低了适配负担。
gap.zht: 380 V（中國）與400 V（摩洛哥）三相電網電壓差異是中國電動機出口摩洛哥最直接的技術差距。僅額定380 V的電動機不能在未經工程評估的情況下直接安裝在400 V電網上。常見解決方案：訂購具備400 V運行能力的雙/多電壓繞組電動機，或確認銘牌電壓範圍涵蓋400 V運行。頻率相同（50 Hz），相比頻率不同的市場降低了適配負擔。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — motors must be rated for the Moroccan 400 V, 50 Hz grid; ONEE grid standard
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic sale — Chinese motors rated 380 V, 50 Hz per GB 755; not automatically rated for 400 V

source.publisher: ONEE — Office National de l'Electricite et de l'Eau Potable (Morocco)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese motors rated for 380 V, 50 Hz may not be directly suitable for Morocco's 400 V, 50 Hz grid without voltage compatibility verification. Exporters should specify motors with nameplate voltage ratings that include 400 V, or provide engineering justification for use at 400 V. This is a concrete technical gap requiring action before shipment. This is informational only and does not constitute engineering or legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 额定380 V、50 Hz的中国电动机在未经电压兼容性核实的情况下，可能无法直接适用于摩洛哥400 V、50 Hz电网。出口商应指定铭牌电压额定值包含400 V的电动机，或提供在400 V下使用的工程论证。这是出货前需要解决的具体技术差距。本内容仅供参考，不构成工程或法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 額定380 V、50 Hz的中國電動機在未經電壓相容性核實的情況下，可能無法直接適用於摩洛哥400 V、50 Hz電網。出口商應指定銘牌電壓額定值包含400 V的電動機，或提供在400 V下使用的工程論證。這是出貨前需要解決的具體技術差距。本內容僅供參考，不構成工程或法律建議。

requirement_topic.en: CE Marking Acceptance via Morocco-EU Advanced Status
requirement_topic.zh: 借助摩洛哥-欧盟高级地位接受CE标志
requirement_topic.zht: 借助摩洛哥-歐盟高級地位接受CE標誌

summary.en: Morocco holds Advanced Status (Statut Avancé) with the European Union, which facilitates broad regulatory alignment and, in many product categories, acceptance of CE marking and EU Declaration of Conformity as evidence of conformity for market access. For industrial AC motors, IMANOR conformity or CE DoC is the accepted pathway; CE marking supported by a valid EU DoC is broadly recognised by Moroccan authorities, reducing the need for separate IMANOR testing in many cases. This does not eliminate all local requirements — importers should confirm with IMANOR and customs whether the specific product category requires a local NM mark or whether CE DoC suffices.
summary.zh: 摩洛哥与欧盟拥有高级地位（Statut Avancé），这促进了广泛的监管协调，并在许多产品类别中允许以CE标志及欧盟符合性声明作为市场准入的合规证明。对于工业交流电动机，IMANOR合规证明或CE符合性声明是被接受的路径；由有效欧盟符合性声明支持的CE标志被摩洛哥主管机构广泛认可，在许多情况下减少了单独进行IMANOR测试的需求。这并不消除所有当地要求——进口商应向IMANOR和海关确认特定产品类别是否需要当地NM标志，或CE符合性声明是否已足够。
summary.zht: 摩洛哥與歐盟擁有高級地位（Statut Avancé），這促進了廣泛的監管協調，並在許多產品類別中允許以CE標誌及歐盟符合性聲明作為市場准入的合規證明。對於工業交流電動機，IMANOR合規證明或CE符合性聲明是被接受的路徑；由有效歐盟符合性聲明支持的CE標誌被摩洛哥主管機構廣泛認可，在許多情況下減少了單獨進行IMANOR測試的需求。這並不消除所有當地要求——進口商應向IMANOR和海關確認特定產品類別是否需要當地NM標誌，或CE符合性聲明是否已足夠。

standards_or_laws: Morocco-EU Association Agreement (Advanced Status — Statut Avance)
IMANOR NM standards alignment with IEC/EN

summary.en: China has no bilateral agreement with Morocco that creates regulatory equivalence for CCC certification. CCC is a domestic Chinese conformity mark and is not recognised in Morocco. Chinese exporters targeting Morocco must acquire CE marking (if they have EU-market products) or obtain IMANOR conformity assessment for the Moroccan market specifically. There is no shortcut via CCC.
summary.zh: 中国与摩洛哥之间没有为CCC认证建立监管等效的双边协议。CCC是中国国内合格标志，在摩洛哥不被认可。针对摩洛哥市场的中国出口商必须获取CE标志（如有欧盟市场产品）或专门为摩洛哥市场进行IMANOR合格评定。不存在通过CCC的捷径。
summary.zht: 中國與摩洛哥之間沒有為CCC認證建立監管等效的雙邊協議。CCC是中國國內合格標誌，在摩洛哥不被認可。針對摩洛哥市場的中國出口商必須獲取CE標誌（如有歐盟市場產品）或專門為摩洛哥市場進行IMANOR合格評定。不存在通過CCC的捷徑。

standards_or_laws: CCC — China Compulsory Certification (domestic CN only, not recognised in Morocco)

gap.en: For Chinese motor exporters, the fastest route to Morocco market access is CE marking (which Morocco accepts via Advanced Status), provided the motor is already CE marked for EU LVD and Ecodesign purposes. Chinese-only CCC certified motors have no recognised route and need either CE marking or IMANOR-specific conformity assessment. Exporters who do not hold CE should pursue IMANOR testing or partner with a CE-certified EU supplier.
gap.zh: 对于中国电动机出口商，进入摩洛哥市场最快的路径是CE标志（摩洛哥通过高级地位接受），前提是电动机已为欧盟LVD和生态设计目的获得CE标志。仅持有中国CCC认证的电动机没有被认可的路径，需要获取CE标志或进行IMANOR专项合格评定。不持有CE标志的出口商应寻求IMANOR测试或与持有CE认证的欧盟供应商合作。
gap.zht: 對於中國電動機出口商，進入摩洛哥市場最快的路徑是CE標誌（摩洛哥通過高級地位接受），前提是電動機已為歐盟LVD和生態設計目的獲得CE標誌。僅持有中國CCC認證的電動機沒有被認可的路徑，需要獲取CE標誌或進行IMANOR專項合格評定。不持有CE標誌的出口商應尋求IMANOR測試或與持有CE認證的歐盟供應商合作。

mandatory_status.target: CE DoC accepted by Morocco via Advanced Status; IMANOR conformity is the alternative route; CCC not recognised
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable — CCC does not provide a recognised route for Morocco; CE or IMANOR conformity is required

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese motors with valid CE marking (LVD + Ecodesign DoC) have the most straightforward path to Morocco market access via the Morocco-EU Advanced Status. Motors with CCC only have no recognised conformity route in Morocco and must obtain CE marking or IMANOR assessment. Importers should confirm the applicable conformity pathway with IMANOR before shipment. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 持有有效CE标志（LVD + 生态设计符合性声明）的中国电动机，可通过摩洛哥-欧盟高级地位获得最便捷的摩洛哥市场准入路径。仅持有CCC的电动机在摩洛哥没有被认可的合规路径，必须获取CE标志或IMANOR评定。进口商在出货前应向IMANOR确认适用的合规路径。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 持有有效CE標誌（LVD + 生態設計符合性聲明）的中國電動機，可通過摩洛哥-歐盟高級地位獲得最便捷的摩洛哥市場准入路徑。僅持有CCC的電動機在摩洛哥沒有被認可的合規路徑，必須獲取CE標誌或IMANOR評定。進口商在出貨前應向IMANOR確認適用的合規路徑。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。
